$comment: version:1 — contract is not yet final; breaking changes will increment this comment.
title: Entity
description: Schema for a proto_website entity JSON file (src/entities/*.json).

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must be unique across all entities. Matches the filename without the .json extension.

type.description: Entity category. Currently only 'project' is in use; future values may include 'experiment', 'tool', 'topic'.

title.description: Human-readable display name. Used as the label in Cosmoboard and other rendering surfaces.

summary.description: One-sentence description. Shown in cards, tooltips, and hover states. Keep under 160 characters.

references.description: Surfaces that render or link to this entity. At least one reference is required.

surface.description: The surface type that consumes this reference.

slug.description: Identifier for this specific surface instance.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the source file for this surface.

tags.description: Optional free-form labels used for filtering and grouping in the UI.

projectSlug.description: Optional. When type is 'project', the slug of the corresponding project HTML page (content/projects/<projectSlug>.html).
